items.title: Presentation: Designing AI Platforms for Reliability: Tools for Certainty, Agents for Discovery
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Designing AI Platforms for Reliability: Tools for Certainty, Agents for Discovery. Aaron Erickson discusses the evolution of AI workflows, shifting from "vibe checking" to building reliable, multi-agent frameworks.

items.title: Pullfrog AI: Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternative Powered by GitHub Actions
items.summaryShort: Pullfrog AI: Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternative Powered by GitHub Actions. Pullfrog is an open-source AI-powered GitHub bot by Colin McDonnell, designed for automation in GitHub Actions.

items.title: Google engineer charged with insider trading after making $1.2M on Polymarket
items.summaryShort: Google engineer charged with insider trading after making $1.2M on Polymarket. According to the complaint, a Google engineer risked over $2.7 million on wagers related to Google's 2025 Year in Search campaign.

items.summaryShort: Why Google's AI can't spell Google (or anything else). Google is embarrassing itself, again.

items.title: Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9
items.summaryShort: Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9. The company has finally set a date for the first customer deliveries of what CEO RJ Scaringe has said is "maybe the most important thing we’ve launched to date."
